brand_identity_system.identity:
SireMammat [cite: 2] Free futures trading education, built on Al Brooks methodology. [cite: 4, 5]
Purple Cow (Seth Godin Methodology) [cite: 6, 8] Teaching the reading of price itself rather than selling signals. [cite: 13] Providing premium education for free in a paid-course dominated space. [cite: 14, 15] Making complex Al Brooks concepts ownable for anyone. [cite: 16, 17]
brand_identity_system.symbolism:
The Crowned Candle [cite: 19, 21] A price action candle with a three-point crown on top. [cite: 48, 56]
The universal symbol of price action and market memory. [cite: 49, 50]
Mastery, royalty, and authority without arrogance. [cite: 51, 52]
Prompts the question "What is that?" which serves as marketing. [cite: 59, 61, 62] Not associated with any major trading competitors or Al Brooks students. [cite: 64, 65, 66] Works as a pure line drawing or stamp without needing color. [cite: 68, 69, 70] Explainable in one sentence: "A price candle with a crown." [cite: 72, 73, 74] Rectangle + vertical line + 3-point crown; recallable after one week. [cite: 76, 77, 78]

deployment_strategy.social_media: Dark gold crown on black in top-left of thumbnails. [cite: 81, 82] Watermark with crown mark in bottom-left of chart breakdowns. [cite: 83, 84]
deployment_strategy.technical_tools: ♛ SM · [cite: 88, 102] label.new() drops the crown mark on live charts. [cite: 103]
deployment_strategy.content: 30% on all content slides. [cite: 100] Centred crown as a section divider. [cite: 97, 101]
